subcodes.first_line: The call of God hath been raised from every direction, yet ye hearken not. The glances of God have turned towards you, O ye who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفع ندآء الله عنکل الجهات ا فانتم لاتسمعون قد ارتدت لحظات الله الیکم یا
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @proclamation to the people of the world, @spiritual transformation, @call to action
